claim: Evidence from explorer and cross-checker is sufficient to support PRD readiness. All project claims are backed by verifiable evidence with no assumptions promoted as facts. Cross-checker resolved the one missing verification (router.ts lines 54-77) which confirms writes_code: false in all agent protocols.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS define explorer (lines 55-60), cross-checker (lines 62-68), and verifier (lines 70-75) roles. All three have writes_code: false at lines 59, 66, and 74 respectively.
evidence.why: Resolves the missing verification from cross-checker. Confirms agent protocols explicitly forbid code writing in evidence mode.

evidence.summary: Boundary detection implementation verified by both explorer and cross-checker. Line numbers accurate.
evidence.why: Core safety mechanism verified by independent agents.

evidence.summary: Runtime enforcement with blocker propagation verified. Evidence shows snapshot before (515) and diff after (566), blockers propagate (584-596).
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms boundary enforcement works as claimed.

evidence.summary: Provider isolation confirmed with separate code paths per provider. Cross-checker corrected line range from 41-109 to 31-109.
evidence.why: Provider-specific isolation prevents cross-provider model leakage.

evidence.summary: Test verifies boundary blocks project file mutation even when agent results pass. Line numbers accurate.
evidence.why: Test evidence proves boundary enforcement is independent of evidence quality.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker results stored with explicit assumptions sections. No assumptions promoted to facts in either record.
evidence.why: Verifies evidence discipline: assumptions separated from claims.

assumptions: Provider CLI argument contracts (Claude -p, Codex exec) remain stable across versions.
risks: Provider CLI breaking changes could break invocation isolation.
Non-git projects might have race conditions in boundary detection if filesystem changes between snapshots.
Tool profile naming drift between provider and harness could silently weaken boundary.

result.notes: Evidence quality verified. Explorer and cross-checker completed with independent verification of all core claims. Minor line number corrections (provider-adapter.ts 31-109 not 41-109, test name misquotations) do not affect substance. Cross-checker missing item (router.ts 54-77) resolved: all agent protocols have writes_code: false. Assumptions properly separated from facts. No blockers remain. PRD ready.
